Charger Run Mode demo

See Charger Run Mode in action

This short, web-optimized demo shows how Charger Run Mode makes the low battery shutdown warning harder to miss when your Mac is running out of time.

Download BatteryCountdown Back to home

Charger Run Mode demo

What the demo shows

  • A visible Charger Run Mode warning when low battery is close to shutdown.
  • The BatteryCountdown menu bar timer staying easy to spot.
  • A clearer moment to save work and plug in before the Mac powers off.

Charger Run Mode demo

Want the same warning on your Mac?

Install BatteryCountdown from the Mac App Store and use Charger Run Mode when a quiet menu bar timer is not enough.

Download BatteryCountdown
